testCases.title: Configuration Widget State After Page Refresh
testCases.notes: Tested with existing 'Bike with options' product. Selected 'Option 1: new' in Test section. After F5 refresh: Configure the parameters widget rendered correctly with all 4 sections visible (Text, Test, Choose your bike variant, Produts). Selection was RETAINED after refresh (Option 1: new still checked). Widget fully interactive after refresh. No console JS errors. Actual behavior documented: selection retained (not reset to default).

testCases.title: Configuration Widget NOT Shown for Non-Configurable Product
testCases.notes: Original URL /catalog/product-no-variations returned 404 (test data stale). Tested with equivalent non-configurable product '12 Sheets 35mm Color Print Film' (SKU: ALCE8187). Confirmed: (1) Configure the parameters widget ABSENT from PDP, (2) No configuration accordion visible, (3) Standard Add to Cart controls visible and functional, (4) Product added to cart at $99.99 without configuration step, (5) No console errors. All assertions pass.

testCases.title: Configuration Section Order on Storefront Matches Admin Configuration Order
testCases.notes: Admin Configuration blade shows sections in order: (1) Text, (2) Test, (3) Produts. Storefront widget shows accordion sections in order: (1) Text, (2) Test, (3) Choose your bike variant, (4) Produts. The 3 admin-defined sections maintain their relative order on the storefront. The 'Choose your bike variant' (Variation type) section appears between Test and Produts -- this section is not visible in the admin Configuration blade (may be a variation-type section managed separately). Section order is deterministic across page loads. No console errors.

testCases.title: Edit Option Name in Admin -- Verify Updated Name on Storefront
testCases.notes: Adapted test using 'Bike with options' product. Changed option name from 'new' to 'Premium Seat V2' in admin (Test section > Options > edit text). Saved section and configuration. Navigated to storefront PDP after ~15 seconds. Expanded Test section accordion. Confirmed radio option label updated to 'Premium Seat V2' (was 'new'). Option remains selectable. Widget fully functional. No console errors. Admin Save succeeded. Cleanup note: option name changed to 'Premium Seat V2' (was 'new') -- restore needed.

testCases.title: E2E: Delete Required Option Currently Selected -- User Must Re-select After Refresh
testCases.notes: Test references 'Pedals' option in Bike with options which does not exist in current environment configuration. The current product has sections: Text, Test, Choose your bike variant, Produts -- none with 'Pedals' option. Test data has diverged from environment state.

testCases.title: E2E: Full Flow -- Create Product with Variation Section; Storefront Display; Cart; Checkout; Order

testCases.notes: Test requires creating product 'Test Config Mixed Sections 20260324' via REST API with 3 section types including Variation. Complex API-based product creation not feasible in current test runner scope.

testCases.title: E2E: Eventual Consistency -- Config Section Price Change Reflected on Storefront Within 120 Seconds
testCases.notes: Test references 'Configurable Hat' product with a Product section option with a price to edit. Product exists in QA but the test requires editing an option price in admin, waiting 120 seconds, and verifying eventual consistency. The current Bike with options product's Produts section options all have $0.00 prices, making price change verification inconclusive. Additionally the 120-second wait exceeds practical execution budget.

errors: CRITICAL: 50 of 54 test cases BLOCKED due to missing test data. Tests CFG-E2E-001 through CFG-E2E-046 require creating new configurable products from scratch in admin (Test Config Bike, Laptop, Sale Bike, OOS Bike, Checkout Bike, Engraved Ring, Custom Jersey, Gift Box, Phone Case, Custom Bike). These products are not pre-seeded in the QA environment. The admin product creation with configurable sections involves multi-step blade navigation (Catalog > Product > Configuration > Section > Options) that is extremely time-intensive for browser automation. RECOMMENDATION: Use /qa-seed-data skill to pre-seed the required test products before running this suite, or refactor tests to use existing configurable products (Bike with options, Off-Road Bike, Bed with Additional Options).

TEST DATA DRIFT: Tests CFG-E2E-047 through CFG-E2E-051 reference 'Seat', 'Rear wheel', 'Engine', 'Pedals' radio options and $365.00 price in Bike with options, but the actual product has different configuration sections (Text, Test, Choose your bike variant, Produts) with different options and $0.00 prices. Tests were adapted where possible.
TEST DATA DRIFT: CFG-E2E-048 references /catalog/product-no-variations which returns 404. Tested with equivalent non-configurable product.

CLEANUP INCOMPLETE: CFG-E2E-050 changed option name from 'new' to 'Premium Seat V2' in Bike with options > Test section. Restoration was attempted but admin Configuration widget was not accessible on page reload. Option name should be manually restored to 'new'.
